Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotChart

  • Uses of PotChart in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotChart
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotChart
    PotSlide.addChart(String chartType)
    Adds a new chart to the slide with default position and size.
    PotChart
    PotSlide.addChart(String chartType, double x, double y, double width, double height)
    Adds a new chart to the slide with specified position and size.
    PotChart
    PotChart.animate(PotAnimation animation)
    Applies an animation to this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.at(double x, double y)
    Sets the position of this chart element to the specified coordinates.
    PotChart
    PotChart.duplicate()
    Throws an UnsupportedOperationException as chart duplication is not supported.
    PotChart
    PotChart.height(double height)
    Sets the height of this chart element (fluent alias for setHeight(double)).
    PotChart
    PotChart.hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
    Attaches a hyperlink to this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.position(double x, double y)
    Sets the position of this chart element to the specified coordinates.
    PotChart
    PotChart.rotate(double angle)
    Sets the rotation angle of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.rotation(double angle)
    Sets the rotation angle of this chart element (fluent alias for rotate(double)).
    PotChart
    PotChart.setHeight(double height)
    Sets the height of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.setWidth(double width)
    Sets the width of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.setX(double x)
    Sets the X-coordinate of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.setY(double y)
    Sets the Y-coordinate of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.shadow(PotShadow shadow)
    Applies a shadow effect to this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.size(double width, double height)
    Sets the width and height of this chart element.
    PotChart
    PotChart.width(double width)
    Sets the width of this chart element (fluent alias for setWidth(double)).
    PotChart
    PotChart.x(double x)
    Sets the X-coordinate of this chart element (fluent alias for setX(double)).
    PotChart
    PotChart.y(double y)
    Sets the Y-coordinate of this chart element (fluent alias for setY(double)).
